backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Lens Studio backend, handling user profiles, photo metadata, and video metadata storage with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (cinema camera UI redesign, blur intensity enhancements, etc.) to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for hooks, components, and pages in the Lens Studio frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lens Studio app with viewport-fit=cover, dark theme-color, and a root div that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing camera/gallery tab state, rendering both CameraPage and GalleryPage simultaneously (toggling visibility) alongside AppHeader, AppFooter, BottomNavigation, and a dark-themed Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AnamorphicOverla: Renders a 2.39:1 anamorphic letterbox overlay with top and bottom black bars and a small aspect ratio label when active, positioned absolutely over the camera viewfinder.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a heart icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters derived from the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Header component showing the Lens Studio logo image, app name, and subtitle with glass morphism styling.
frontend/src/components/BlurStrengthTogg: A pill-shaped toggle button group for selecting blur strength levels (Light, Strong, Max), highlighting the active level in amber and calling onSelect when a level is chosen.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom navigation bar with Camera and Gallery tabs, showing an amber indicator line and scaled icon for the active tab.
frontend/src/components/CinemaControlsPa: A cinema-style controls panel component with a draggable circular exposure wheel, color profile selector (Rec.709, Log-C, D-Cinema), and an anamorphic overlay toggle, styled with amber glass-panel aesthetics.
frontend/src/components/CountdownOverlay: A fullscreen countdown overlay that displays remaining seconds with a pulse animation on each tick and provides a cancel button.
frontend/src/components/FocalLengthIndic: A small overlay badge that displays the approximate 35mm equivalent focal length derived from a zoom level or explicit focal length prop.
frontend/src/components/FocusEditPanel.t: A post-capture focus editing panel that renders a canvas with simulated bokeh (blurred background, sharp focus area with feathered radial mask), and exposes controls for focus point, radius, and blur intensity with export/save functionality.
frontend/src/components/GridOverlay.tsx: An SVG overlay component that renders either a rule-of-thirds grid or a square crop guide with corner accents over the camera viewfinder.
frontend/src/components/ManualControlsPa: A vertical side panel with two slider controls for manual exposure (EV) and white balance (Kelvin), showing fallback labels when hardware controls are unsupported.
frontend/src/components/ModeSelector.tsx: A horizontally scrollable camera mode selector (Photo, Video, Portrait, Cinematic, Night, Pro) with an animated underline indicator that highlights the active mode.
frontend/src/components/PhotoLightbox.ts: A fullscreen photo lightbox dialog supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), prev/next buttons, photo deletion with a loading state, and timestamp display.
React component providing manual camera controls (ISO, shutter speed, focus mode/distance, white balance) via sliders and buttons, applying constraints to a MediaStreamTrack when supported.
frontend/src/components/VideoLightbox.ts: Full-screen video lightbox modal with playback, navigation (prev/next), delete, and a focus-edit panel toggle, supporting keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/VideoResolutionS: UI component that renders resolution preset buttons (including 4K) and detects 4K hardware support via getUserMedia to disable unsupported options.
frontend/src/components/VideoThumbnail.t: Grid thumbnail component for a recorded video that seeks to 0.5s to generate a preview frame and displays a play button overlay with duration badge.
frontend/src/components/ZoomSlider.tsx: Slider component for camera zoom that shows a transient zoom-level label and hides itself when maxZoom is 1 or less.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIBlur.ts: Custom hook that applies a canvas-based portrait blur effect (blurred background with a sharp center oval) to a video element and optionally exposes the result as a MediaStream.
Custom hook that manages a boolean anamorphic overlay toggle state, persisting it to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlurStrength.ts: Custom hook managing a blur strength level (Light/Strong/Max) with corresponding multipliers, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraMode.ts: Custom hook that stores and retrieves the active camera mode (Photo, Video, Portrait, etc.) from localStorage with a default of 'Photo'.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraSettings.ts: Utility hook that loads and saves camera settings (facing mode, grid, timer, torch, exposure, white balance) to localStorage with typed defaults.
frontend/src/hooks/useCineColorProfile.t: Provides a hook to manage a cinematic color profile ('Rec.709', 'Log-C', 'D-Cinema') with corresponding CSS filter strings, persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCinematicMode.ts: Implements a cinematic camera effect by rendering a blurred background with a sharp elliptical center subject and letterbox bars onto an offscreen canvas, capturing it as a MediaStream.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: Provides a countdown timer hook with start and cancel controls, tracking remaining seconds and active state, and invoking a callback on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusEdit.ts: Manages focus-edit state (focus point, radius, blur intensity, preview toggle) for a given video ID, persisting settings to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useManualControls.ts: Manages manual camera controls for exposure (EV) and white balance (Kelvin), applying constraints to the MediaStreamTrack and adjusting video element brightness as a fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, saving, and deleting photos and videos via a backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTorchControl.ts: Manages torch/flashlight state for a camera track, detecting hardware support via getCapabilities and applying torch constraints through applyConstraints.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoResolution.ts: Provides a hook to select and persist a video resolution preset (1080p30, 1080p60, 4K30) using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useZoomControl.ts: Manages camera zoom state with support for programmatic setting, hardware zoom via MediaStreamTrack constraints, and pinch-to-zoom touch gesture handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines dark-mode CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens), and adds utility classes for glass morphism, shutter ring, cinematic glow, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CameraPage.tsx: Main camera UI page that integrates hooks for camera control, zoom, torch, countdown, cinematic/AI modes, and video recording, rendering overlays and controls for photo/video capture with ICP backend saving.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays photos and videos in a merged, timestamp-sorted grid with lightbox navigation and delete support.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with oklch-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, keyframe animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, version, architectural notes, known issues, and a full list of existing and planned features for a professional Sony Xperia-inspired camera app. Serves as the source of truth for feature IDs, requirements, and build history.
